attempts.hypothesis: The candidate added an unsupported WaitNonPower state and power-of-two latency special case; removing that state should make valid assert after exactly WIDTH restoring steps for every parameter value.

attempts.hypothesis: The port name rst may indicate an active-high reset; changing the reset polarity to active-high while keeping the uniform WIDTH-step divider should prevent the design from remaining in reset under the testbench reset convention.
